mapper.sql: id, source_type, point_amount, daily_limit, enabled, operator, reason, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM point_rule_config WHERE source_type = #{sourceType} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM point_rule_config WHERE enabled = 1 AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT
FROM point_rule_config ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT
FROM point_rule_config WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM point_rule_config WHERE source_type = #{sourceType} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM point_rule_config WHERE source_type = #{sourceType} AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO point_rule_config (source_type, point_amount, daily_limit, enabled, operator, reason, created_at, updated_at, version) VALUES (#{sourceType}, #{pointAmount}, #{dailyLimit}, #{enabled}, #{operator}, #{reason}, NOW(), NOW(), 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE point_rule_config SET point_amount = #{pointAmount}, daily_limit = #{dailyLimit}, enabled = #{enabled}, operator = #{operator}, reason = #{reason}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE point_rule_config SET deleted_at = NOW(), operator = #{operator}, reason = #{reason}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE point_rule_config SET deleted_at = NULL, source_type = #{sourceType}, point_amount = #{pointAmount}, daily_limit = #{dailyLimit}, enabled = #{enabled}, operator = #{operator}, reason = #{reason}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL
